whatsNew: Polish — roadmap entries in What's New tab now show a concise feature title with detailed description below; all 26 roadmap entries updated with detail text

changes: Polish — roadmap entries in What's New tab now show a concise feature title with detailed description below; all 26 roadmap entries updated with detail text

Feature — Export overlay now has a team filter dropdown (All Teams or specific team); selecting a team filters the visual to show only that team card and changes the download button to Download Roster; roster export generates a per-team .xlsx with player name, age, eval scores, overall, tier, positions, and draft round sorted by round; closing the overlay resets the filter to All Teams
Fix — export overlay subtitle now shows division and player count for All Teams, or coach names and player count for a specific team; removed hardcoded 11-13 Division reference
Bug fix — React.Fragment key in player table was still using idx (old array index variable) instead of p.id; caused ReferenceError crash when opening Players section in Commissioner Mode

Feature — Player table column sorting in Commissioner Mode: all 10 columns are sortable (Name, Age, S1–S5, Pre-Assigned, Round, Pending); click any header to sort, click again to reverse; active column highlighted in blue with ▲/▼ indicator; unsorted columns show ⇅

Refactor — updatePlayer and removePlayer now use stable player id instead of array index; addPlayer and CSV import assign ids; existing players without ids get assigned on load; enables safe sorting without mutation bugs

Feature — Password recovery: "Forgot password?" link added to Commissioner login modal; requires typing RESET PASSWORD to confirm; resets password to default (commissioner) via new server endpoint POST /api/commissioner/reset-password; success screen prompts commissioner to log in with the default password

Feature — Pre-assigned player visual treatment: cards now show a blue tint background and ⭐ Pre-Assigned badge driven by commissioner config; draft button replaced with locked label showing assigned team; border highlights in blue when selected

Cleanup — COACH_DAUGHTERS hardcoded constant fully removed; activePreAssigned from commissioner config is now the sole source of truth for pre-assignment across PlayerCard, PlayerModal, pick log, team view, pick order, and NBA logic
Cleanup — INITIAL_DRAFTED simplified to empty object; commissioner pre-assigned players sync into drafted state via existing useEffect on config load
Guide / Tour / Legend — pre-assigned section updated to describe blue tint background and commissioner-based assignment; legend updated to mention blue badge + tint
Bug fix — CSV import example display was missing the Round column in the header row; updated to match the Download Template output

Bug fix — toolbar container div (background-primary header bar) was missing its closing ; caused Babel JSX parser to remain inside the toolbar JSX context for the rest of the DraftBoard return, producing "Unexpected token" error at DarkModeWrapper
Bug fix — V1.16.0 introduced an unbalanced JSX div wrapping the first-run nudge banner and filter bar; outer wrapper div was not closed inside the conditional, causing a Babel syntax error on load

Feature — CSV Template Download: new ⬇ Download Template button in Commissioner Mode Players section generates a pre-formatted CSV with configured station names as column headers and one example row; station names update dynamically if eval stations are changed

Feature — My Team first-run nudge: yellow banner shown on the draft board when no team has been explicitly selected; prompts coaches to click their team abbreviation in the toolbar; dismissed automatically when a team is selected or via the Dismiss button; only shown when players exist
Feature — My Team buttons no longer appear highlighted until a team is explicitly selected; prevents confusion about which team is active before selection
Guide — Commissioner Players section added covering CSV import, template download, pending eval, and prior scores behavior
Tour — Commissioner Mode step updated to mention CSV template download

Feature — Division field added to Commissioner Mode League Setup; stored in commissionerConfig as division; shown in board header subtitle between league name and player count (e.g. Spring 2026 · Pikesville Girls Softball · 11-13 Division · 45 Players); hidden when blank

Feature — players with no current year scores but valid prior season scores now automatically use prior scores for overall, tier, PR, and team averages; pendingEval remains false; player card shows amber "Prior season scores" note so coaches know the data source
Visual fix — tier filter buttons now use var(--color-text-primary) for inactive state text color; was hardcoded #374151 which was unreadable in dark mode

Visual fix — dark mode header gradient now uses hexToDarkHeader() at 35% lightness and 55% saturation instead of hexToDarkSurface() at 15% lightness; commissioner-chosen header colors are now clearly visible in dark mode rather than appearing nearly black; color identity is preserved per WCAG AA standards for white text on colored backgrounds
Visual fix — pending eval tier group header was hardcoded as "Pending 2026 Evals"; now displays as "Pending Evals" with no hardcoded year
Visual fix — pre-assigned players with no round set now show "Pre · —" in the pick log instead of "Pre · Rnull"; affects both the compact header pick log and the full pick log overlay

Feature — Pending Eval checkbox added to Commissioner Mode player table; when checked, player is flagged as pendingEval, score inputs are grayed out and disabled, overall/tier are set to null, player receives yellow pending treatment on board cards and is excluded from team averages and PR calculation
Bug fix — new player score fields now default to empty string instead of 0; inputs show placeholder dash instead of zero until scores are entered
Bug fix — cfgPlayers useMemo now reads pendingEval from commissioner player data instead of always setting false; CSV import also defaults pendingEval to false for imported players

Bug fix — PR (Projected Round) badge now computed dynamically from activePlayers instead of the hardcoded RAW_PLAYERS constant; commissioner-added players and pre-assigned players now receive a PR badge
Bug fix — projectedRounds is now a useMemo inside DraftBoard using activePlayers and cfgTeamKeys; updates automatically whenever players are added or team count changes
Cleanup — removed hardcoded PROJECTED_ROUNDS constant that was based on Springfield demo data

Bug fix — pre-assigned player team and round assignments in Commissioner Mode now immediately update the board without requiring a page refresh; a useEffect syncs activePreAssigned into drafted whenever commissioner config changes; commissioner assignments always overwrite existing drafted entries for pre-assigned players
Visual fix — pre-assigned round dropdown width increased from 60px to 80px; double-digit rounds (e.g. Rd 12) now display fully instead of being truncated
Feature — Number of Rounds field added to Commissioner Mode League Setup (default 12); stored in commissionerConfig as numRounds
Bug fix — pre-assigned round dropdown now always shows all configured rounds instead of computing from current player count; was showing only Round 1 when few players had been entered

Consistency — cfgNumRounds is now the single source of truth for round count across all board features: handleAutoDraft, onTheClock, Pick Order tab render, Pick Order round filter dropdown, Excel export, and Commissioner player summary row all use cfgNumRounds
Consistency — Commissioner player summary row now shows the configured round count instead of a dynamic calculation

Bug fix — schedule bar now displays items in chronological order regardless of the order they were entered in Commissioner Mode; YYYY-MM-DD dates sort correctly as strings; free-text dates with M/D patterns (e.g. Tue 3/17) are parsed for sorting; unparseable entries sort to the end; commissioner entry order is preserved in state

Bug fix — board was falling back to RAW_PLAYERS (Springfield demo data) when no commissioner config existed or after a factory reset; activePlayers now uses an empty array instead of RAW_PLAYERS — commissioner player data is the sole source of truth for the live board; RAW_PLAYERS remains in the codebase for tour animations and guide examples only

Bug fix — New Season / Factory Reset: client was not clearing commissioner config after reset; FULL_STATE handler only called onCommissionerConfigReceived when config was truthy, silently skipping the null value sent after a factory reset; fixed to always call onCommissionerConfigReceived on FULL_STATE regardless of config value
Schedule cleanup — DRAFT_INFO schedule fields removed; schedule is now entirely commissioner-driven with no hardcoded defaults or demo data
Schedule cleanup — DEFAULT_CONFIG.schedule changed to empty array; commissioners add all rows themselves
Schedule cleanup — cfgSchedule fallback returns empty array instead of DRAFT_INFO rows; schedule strip hidden when no rows configured
Schedule cleanup — Email Generator fields that were pre-filled from DRAFT_INFO (firstPracticeDate, openingDay) now start empty

Date format — formatScheduleDate() helper added; dates entered via the commissioner date picker (YYYY-MM-DD) now display as e.g. Wed 3/18/2026; pre-formatted strings like "Tue 3/17 @ 8:00 PM" are passed through unchanged

Bug fix — Analytics Tab: all four charts now update data in place using chart.update("none") instead of destroying and recreating on every state change; eliminates chart flicker and legend toggle reset caused by periodic WebSocket reconnects
Bug fix — Draft Score Timeline Y axis was locked to 0-5 (matching eval station scale) while cumulative avg scores are 14-22; axis now auto-scales to data range
Analytics Tab dark mode: charts track _isDark flag and only fully recreate when theme changes; all other data updates are non-destructive

Bug fix — Analytics Tab Draft Score Timeline: Chart.js was mutating data arrays from a previous chart instance via _chartjs listeners; fixed by passing data.slice() and labels.slice() to ensure fresh array copies, removing the setTimeout that was causing stale chart instance interference, and restoring synchronous destroy/recreate pattern used by the other three charts

Bug fix — Analytics Tab Draft Score Timeline still blank: chart creation deferred via setTimeout(50ms) to ensure canvas is fully painted before Chart.js measures it; cleanup function updated to clear timer and destroy chart instance

Bug fix — Analytics Tab Draft Score Timeline was blank: rebuilt using teamRosters (which already contains player objects with draftRound and overall) instead of draftHistory + name lookup; eliminates string/int round mismatch and correctly includes pre-assigned players in cumulative averages
Analytics Tab — new tab added between Pick Order and Notes; visible to all coaches
Analytics Tab — Chart 1: Team Radar — overlapping polygon chart showing each team's average score across all eval stations; uses configured station names; color-matched to team colors
Analytics Tab — Chart 2: Tier Distribution — grouped bar chart showing player count per tier per team; only tiers with drafted players shown
Analytics Tab — Chart 3: Draft Score Timeline — line chart showing each team's cumulative average overall score after each round; reveals how team quality evolved through the draft
Analytics Tab — Chart 4: Station Averages — horizontal grouped bar chart showing each team's average per eval station side by side; most precise view for spotting gaps between teams
Analytics Tab — all four charts are dark mode aware, update in real time as picks are made, and show an empty state message before any picks are entered
Analytics Tab — Chart.js 4.4.1 added via CDN; chart instances managed via useRef with proper destroy/recreate on re-render
Guide — Analytics Tab section added
Tour — Analytics tab step added after Pick Order step
Roadmap — Analytics Tab marked complete
Bug fix #10 — commissioner header gradient now dark-mode aware: hexToDarkSurface() applied to header color when dark mode is active; affects main board header and Draft Recap overlay
Cleanup #8 — Board Tagline field removed from Commissioner Mode; field was saved to config but never rendered on the live board; DEFAULT_CONFIG, state, buildConfig, and header preview all updated
Dark Mode Phase 7 — remaining hardcoded tint backgrounds replaced: #f0f9ff (info), #fee2e2 (danger), #dbeafe/#fce7f3 (versioning badges) all now use semantic CSS variables

Dark Mode Phase 7 — hardcoded text colors on surface tints replaced: #92400e (amber), #991b1b (red), #0369a1 (info), #15803d/#166534 (green) all now use var(--color-text-primary) for dark mode readability
Dark Mode Phase 7 — cancel button backgrounds updated from #f9fafb to var(--color-background-secondary)
Dark Mode Phase 7 — remove/delete button borders (#fca5a5) replaced with var(--color-border-secondary); danger surface button text updated to CSS variable
Dark Mode Phase 7 — yellow warning borders (#fde68a) replaced with var(--color-border-secondary) throughout
Bug fix: tab bar scroll fade overlay was hardcoded to #fff — now uses var(--color-background-primary); light gradient artifact in dark mode resolved

Known issue #10: commissioner-chosen header colors are not adjusted for dark mode — a light header color chosen in Commissioner Mode will remain light in dark mode; proposed fix is to auto-darken the header gradient using hexToDarkSurface() when dark mode is active
Dark Mode Phase 6 — tab bar inactive buttons (btnStyle) now use CSS variables; light rectangle artifact in toolbar resolved
Dark Mode Phase 6 — round selector and position tag buttons in PlayerCard now use CSS variables for inactive state
Dark Mode Phase 6 — Copy Text and Copy HTML buttons now have explicit color property; text readable in dark mode
Dark Mode Phase 6 — CommissionerPanel inputStyle and Players tab editStyle now include color: var(--color-text-primary); all editable fields readable in dark mode
Dark Mode Phase 6 — team move up/down buttons in Commissioner Panel now include color property
Dark Mode Phase 6 — Guide tab tour banner updated to use CSS variables for background and text colors
Dark Mode Phase 6 — Notes tab editor background now uses CSS variables (was hardcoded #fff)
Dark Mode Phase 6 — email highlight spans now include color:#000 to ensure black text on yellow background regardless of theme
Dark Mode Phase 5 — scrollbar thumb now dark-aware (#4b5563) via [data-theme=dark] CSS override
Dark Mode Phase 5 — Guide tab textColor and titleColor fields replaced with CSS variables; guide section text now readable in dark mode
Dark Mode Phase 5 — Players tab prior scores row background and border colors updated to CSS variables
Dark Mode Phase 5 — Guide hasBorder check updated to work with CSS variable bg values
Dark Mode Phase 5 — tour ANIMS cssText strings updated: score bar tracks, card borders, button backgrounds, notes borders all now use CSS variables

Dark Mode Phase 4 — replaced 94 hardcoded border colors (#e5e7eb, #d1d5db, #f3f4f6) with CSS variables across all inline styles, ternaries, and state-conditional expressions; includes divider lines, score bar tracks, toggle tracks, disabled button borders, and tier/team filter buttons

Bug fix: ThemeContext.Provider moved above DraftBoard via new DarkModeWrapper component — previously the Provider was inside DraftBoard's return, meaning DraftBoard itself could not consume it; team dark tint colors now correctly applied in Pick Order and PlayerCard
Architecture: DarkModeWrapper now owns darkMode state and data-theme effect; DraftBoard receives darkMode/setDarkMode as props; all child components consume ThemeContext correctly via useIsDark()

Bug fix: Pick Order tab was not using dark team tint colors — root cause was useIsDark() called inside an IIFE in JSX, violating React Rules of Hooks; moved isDark to DraftBoard top level and removed the invalid hook call
Checklist updated: hook placement check added — all hook calls must be at the top level of a function component
Dark Mode Phase 3 — React Context (ThemeContext) added for app-wide theme awareness; useIsDark() hook available to all components
Dark Mode Phase 3 — hexToDarkSurface() helper computes HSL-based dark surface tints from team primary colors — industry standard approach preserving hue identity
Dark Mode Phase 3 — 7 semantic CSS surface variables added (--color-surface-success/warning/danger/info/purple/amber) with light and dark values; system preference media query also updated
Dark Mode Phase 3 — all hardcoded accent tint backgrounds replaced with CSS variables throughout: eval score cells, card headers, pending/Most Improved states, Coach/NBA banners, Guide sections
Dark Mode Phase 3 — team card backgrounds (PlayerCard, Pick Order) now use darkLight (HSL-computed) in dark mode and existing light color in light mode
Known issue: tour animation ANIMS still use some hardcoded light tint backgrounds — deferred to Phase 5 polish

Dark Mode fixes — scouting card header ternary backgrounds, card border, YoY section border, delta color function; player card background ternary, score bar tracks, station label color ternary; team view bar tracks all now CSS variable-aware

Dark Mode fixes — resolved 10 readability issues: Recap button text, Players tab alternating row backgrounds, Archive box ternary background, Notes toolbar button text/border, Pick Order row backgrounds, Scouting eval score neutral cell backgrounds, Changelog collapsed bucket and version badge backgrounds, Tour step 8 scouting animation delta text color

Dark Mode Phase 2 — replaced 150 hardcoded text colors (#111827, #374151, #6b7280, #9ca3af) with CSS variables (--color-text-primary, --color-text-secondary, --color-text-tertiary); text is now readable in dark mode; button/badge/disabled-state colors using these values as backgrounds were intentionally preserved

Dark Mode Phase 1 — replaced 87 hardcoded background colors (#fff, #f8fafc, #f3f4f6, #fafafa) with CSS variables (--color-background-primary, --color-background-secondary); card and panel backgrounds now respond to theme switching

Dark Mode — three-way theme toggle (☀️ Light / 🌙 Dark / 💻 System) added to toolbar; System follows OS preference and updates automatically if OS setting changes; preference saved to localStorage and persists across page refreshes
Dark theme applies to entire page including Commissioner Panel, modals, and overlays
Guide updated with dark mode documentation
Roadmap: Dark Mode marked complete
Bug fix: browser tab title was hardcoded as the demo board name; now dynamically reflects configured sport emoji and board title from Commissioner Mode league setup

Bug fix: Scouting tab crashed when navigating to it — root cause was cs variable changed from stats object to boolean in V1.13.2; removed stale batting/pitching stats block that depended on PREVIOUSLY_COACHED data which was always empty
Previously Coached Flag — each coach can now mark players they coached last season using a 🏅 toggle on any player card or in the player detail modal

Coached flags are private per team, persist across restarts and Reset Draft, sync in real time via WebSocket, and show as a purple 🏅 Prev. Coached badge on cards, in the Scouting tab, and in Pick Order
NBA tiebreaker now reads from live coached flags — previously coached players are boosted when weighted scores are within 0.01
Roadmap: Previously Coached Flag marked complete
Legend, Guide, and Tour updated with coached flag documentation
Bug fix: removing a position in Commissioner Mode now strips that position tag from all drafted players immediately
Known issue added: position labels cannot be edited inline — delete and re-add as workaround
Commissioner Mode — new Positions section: add, remove, and reorder position tags with up/down arrows; positions are saved to commissionerConfig and sync to all connected clients
Position tags on player cards now use commissioner-configured positions; falls back to default softball positions if none configured
Guide and Tour updated — position tag descriptions no longer list hardcoded softball positions; reference commissioner configurability
Resolved known issue #7: position tags are now commissioner-configurable

New Season / Factory Reset — new Board Settings action in Commissioner Mode; wipes all picks, history, notes, position tags, commissioner config, and resets the commissioner password to default; requires re-entry of commissioner password plus typing NEW SEASON to confirm; syncs instantly to all connected clients
Guide tab and Tour: Board Settings and Commissioner Mode descriptions updated to include New Season / Factory Reset
Bug fix: Guide sort description and Pick Order guide text no longer reference softball-specific terms; updated to generic language
Bug fix: tour checklist item "Pitchers first" updated to "Priority station players first"
Bug fix: hardcoded 🥎 emoji in tour animation replaced with multi-sport icons; Export overlay header now draws from configured sport emoji and season name
Bug fix: legend, sort dropdown, player card, player modal, and tour animations no longer use hardcoded softball/pitching display labels — all updated to generic priority station language
What's New tab: changelog entries now grouped and collapsed by minor version (e.g. V1.11, V1.10); most recent group expanded by default, older groups collapsed
What's New tab: added Versioning section documenting patch/minor/major version rules and thresholds
Bug fix: scouting tour animation (Step 8) contained real player names; replaced with fictional names
Bug fix: roadmap now renders in correct order — Planned → Future → Complete
Roadmap: removed in-season pitcher usage tracker (out of scope for draft board); promoted New Season / Factory Reset and Previously Coached Flag from Future to Planned
Roadmap: added What's New tab collapsible version sections as Planned

Bug fix: PlayerModal scouting notes textarea was still editable after archiving; boardArchived prop added to PlayerModal, textarea set to readOnly and onChange gated; archived banner shown above notes section
Notes tab: contentEditable disabled and archived banner shown when board is archived; onInput gated to prevent changes
Email tab: boardArchived prop added; form fields hidden with read-only message; preview section contentEditable and onInput both disabled when archived
Commissioner Panel: Save Changes button and password field hidden when archived; header subtitle updated to indicate read-only state with link to Board Settings

Bug fix: Full Reset was not clearing team notes or player scouting notes on the client — notes callbacks were merging incoming state rather than replacing it, so empty {} from the server had no effect
Fix: notes callbacks now replace the store entirely rather than merging; useDraftSync condition updated to always fire callbacks even when incoming notes object is empty

Bug fix: handleAutoDraft was rebuilding drafted state from scratch, discarding all position tags; now preserves existing positions arrays across all players before assigning picks — consistent with handleReset behavior

Bug fix: Commissioner Reset Draft endpoint was clearing bs.state entirely, discarding position tags; now preserves any positions arrays when resetting picks and history — consistent with existing handleReset behavior on the client

Bug fix: position tags were inaccessible on pre-assigned players with a commissioner-set round — the blue 'Round X set by Commissioner' message was swallowing the entire isSelected block including position buttons; position tags now rendered independently of the round lock message
Bug fix: CommissionerPanel was referencing boardLocked as a closure variable — it is now passed as a prop from DraftBoard and correctly reflects current lock state in Board Settings
Bug fix: Draft Lock button was always locking (passed !boardArchived instead of !boardLocked to the API); now correctly toggles based on current lock state
Lock button label now shows current action — '🔒 Lock Board' when unlocked, '🔓 Unlock Board' when locked; button turns green when board is locked

Commissioner Panel — new Board Settings section with four actions: Draft Lock toggle (syncs to all clients), Reset Draft (picks + history only, type RESET to confirm), Full Reset (clears everything including notes and position tags, type FULL RESET to confirm), Archive Board (permanent read-only lock with archive unlock code, type ARCHIVE to confirm)
Unarchive Board: commissioner can unarchive using the unlock code set at archive time — requires separate unlock code from commissioner password for safety
boardArchived state added to board runtime — all toolbar controls disabled when archived; 'Season Archived — Read Only' badge shown; Lock Board button hidden
Archived state enforced server-side — UPDATE, UPDATE_NOTES, and UPDATE_PLAYER_NOTE WebSocket messages rejected when board is archived
Commissioner password now passed through to Board Settings API calls — stored as session state when commissioner authenticates
server.js: loadState/saveState updated with archived and archiveUnlockCode fields; fullStatePayload helper added; five new commissioner endpoints: /lock, /reset, /fullreset, /archive, /unarchive
Guide: new Commissioner Mode category with Board Settings section documenting all four actions
Tour: new Commissioner Mode step added

Legend: amber border description updated to reference priority station; purple badge updated to 'coached by you last season'; yellow background year removed; team view bar description updated to reflect score-based bars

Guide: Overview updated — removed Springfield team names; Eval System updated — removed hardcoded station names, describes configurable stations; NBA updated — removed softball-specific weights and Homer Simpson reference; Scouting updated — removed Homer Simpson/game stats reference; Team View updated — describes 5 horizontal score bars; Draft Recap updated — describes dynamic station names
Tour: eval, nba, teamview, scouting, and ready steps all updated to be sport-agnostic and remove hardcoded references
Team View bars: switched from rank-based width (last place = invisible) to score-based width (val/5.0 * 100%) — bar always visible for any non-zero score; rank communicated by color and label only
rankLabel() and rankColor() now dynamic based on actual team count — handles any number of teams; last place correctly labeled 'Weakest' regardless of league size
handleAutoDraft bug fix: was starting slot assignment at Round 2, skipping Round 1 entirely — now correctly starts at Round 1
Prior season scores (PS1–PS5): commissioner player table gains expandable sub-row for prior scores with live YoY delta; cfgPlayers passes priorScores/priorOverall through to player objects
Scouting tab: when commissioner config active, uses player's own prior scores instead of PRIOR_SCORES constant; shows empty state with instructions when no prior data present
PlayerModal and NBA logic updated to use player priorOverall for YoY when commissioner config active
SCORES_2025 renamed to PRIOR_SCORES, COACHED_LAST_YEAR renamed to PREVIOUSLY_COACHED; both emptied — Springfield demo data removed
Station rankings generalized: teamStats now computes S1–S5 averages by index; rankOf() accepts station number 1–5 or 'overall'; all hardcoded hitting/pitching/fielding keys removed
Team View tab: redesigned card layout — colored header, 3-stat summary row (Avg Score, Avg Age, Priority count), 5 horizontal ranking bars with progress bar + value + rank label
Export overlay and recap team cards updated to match new horizontal bar layout
Recap: station averages and callouts fully dynamic; narrative uses configured station names; hardcoded softball references removed
PlayerCard eval bars: uses configured station names and priority index instead of hardcoded Fielding/Hitting/Pitching labels
Commissioner Panel text readability fix: main content area now has explicit white background
Schedule section: date column changed from free-text to type=date date picker

Pre-assigned round assignment: commissioner player table adds optional Round selector per pre-assigned player; cfgPreAssigned passes round through; player card shows blue lock message when commissioner has set a round; CSV import accepts optional Round column
Bug fix: PlayerModal was looking up players in RAW_PLAYERS only — now searches activePlayers
Bug fix: team view, export overlay, and recap were still iterating hardcoded TEAMS constant — all replaced with cfgTeams
Bug fix: multiple stray p-is-not-defined errors in teamStats and recap stationAvgs closures
Bug fix: pitchRank/hitRank/fieldRank undefined in recap after station generalization
Commissioner Panel — League Setup expanded: Season Name, Sport Emoji, Board Tagline, Board Title (auto-composed, overridable), Header Color with auto-gradient; live header preview as you edit
Commissioner Panel — Teams expanded: snake vs. straight draft toggle, Round 1 pick order via ↑ ↓ buttons; teams cap raised to 12
Commissioner Panel — new Schedule section: edit existing rows, add/remove custom rows

Board runtime fully config-aware: header gradient/title/tagline/emoji, schedule, team tiles, team selector, pick log, team view, scouting, pick order, notes, recap, XLSX export all read from live cfgTeams/cfgLeague/cfgSchedule
Player pool uses commissioner Players when saved; falls back to Springfield demo data
Pre-assigned players read from commissioner config; falls back to COACH_DAUGHTERS
NBA banner uses commissioner Priority Station — label, threshold, and rationale text all config-driven
Pick Order: round count, team list, snake/straight order driven by commissioner config
handleReset and handleAutoDraft use config-aware pre-assignments and team order
Recap narrative and callouts use config priority station label; legend text updated
PlayerCard and PlayerModal accept teams, stations, leagueLabel, priorityIdx props
Added Commissioner Mode — password-protected panel via new ⚙️ Commissioner button in board header
Password modal: portal-rendered, Enter to submit, Escape to cancel, session-persisted unlock
Commissioner Panel: full-screen overlay with sidebar nav — League Setup, Teams, Eval Stations, Players, Security
Players: inline editable table with add/remove rows; CSV import via file upload or paste
Security: change commissioner password from within the panel
All changes save to state.json via authenticated POST and broadcast via WebSocket
Server: added POST /api/commissioner/verify, /api/commissioner/settings, /api/commissioner/password endpoints
Server: loadState/saveState updated to persist commissionerPassword and commissionerConfig; FULL_STATE broadcasts include commissionerConfig
Added 'New to the board?' banner at top of Guide tab with a Launch Tour button
Banner styled in indigo to match the tour modal header — visually distinct from guide sections

Added :root CSS variable definitions to stylesheet — --color-background-primary, --color-background-secondary, --color-border-tertiary, --color-border-secondary, --color-text-primary, --color-text-secondary and more
Variables were previously undefined on the NAS (only resolved in claude.ai host environment), causing modal card backgrounds to be transparent
Added @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) overrides for all variables — dark mode foundation is now in place
All existing var() references in TutorialModal and throughout the board now resolve correctly
Fixed tutorial overlay backdrop — root cause identified: rgba transparency on position:fixed elements fails when rendered inside #root but works when appended directly to document.body
Switched TutorialModal to use ReactDOM.createPortal(content, document.body) — renders outside React root, matching the browser behavior that works
Fixed tutorial overlay backdrop — root cause was browser rgba compositing failure with inline styles
Moved overlay background to .tut-overlay CSS class in the stylesheet — rgba(0,0,0,0.72) in a stylesheet renders correctly where inline style does not
Added dark mode override: rgba(0,0,0,0.82) under prefers-color-scheme: dark
Cleaned up overlay div — removed all stale fix attempts (minHeight, minWidth, width/height 100%, boxSizing, translateZ) leaving only the necessary positioning styles
Fixed tutorial modal backdrop not showing — root cause was paint order: overlay was sibling #4 of 6 so later siblings painted over it regardless of position:fixed
Moved TutorialModal render to last child position in DraftBoard — after footer, after all other siblings — so nothing paints over it
Fixed tutorial modal overlay — added explicit width/height/minHeight/minWidth to guarantee full-page coverage in all browsers
Tour button updated from '? Tour' to '👋 Tour'
Moved Tour button from footer to board header, next to Export button — styled to match
Removed Tour link from footer
Fixed tutorial modal overlay — replaced inset shorthand with explicit top/left/right/bottom for broader browser compatibility
Added Onboarding Tutorial — 15-step guided walkthrough covering every board feature
Each step includes a looping animation demonstrating the feature in action

Steps: Welcome, Eval System, Tiers/PR, Set My Team, Next Best Available, Drafting a Player, Undo/Reset/Lock, Scouting Tab, Team View, Pick Order, Notes/Scouting Notes, Position Tags, Email Generator, Recap/Export, Ready to Draft

Animated demos: eval bars filling in, tier list, team button cycling, NBA mode switching, card expand/round/team sequence, undo animation, YoY scouting cards, team view bars, pick order rows, live typing in notes and email fields, position tag toggling, draft recap reveal
Progress bar in header shows completion percentage
Keyboard navigation: left/right arrow keys to move between steps, Escape to close
Skip Tour button available on every step
Final step has Start Drafting! CTA that closes the modal
Accessible via '? Tour' link in the board footer
Rearchitected inline editing in the email preview — same ref pattern used by the Notes tab
Replaced dangerouslySetInnerHTML on contentEditable divs with imperative innerHTML via sectionRefs — eliminates React re-render conflicts
Reset button now uses onMouseDown instead of onClick to fire before blur — prevents focus/blur race condition
onInput (not onBlur) now sets editedSections state — Reset button appears immediately as you type
useEffect runs after every render to refresh non-edited sections from form field changes without disturbing user edits
Reset imperatively restores section innerHTML from buildSectionHtml and clears the edited flag
Fixed: Reset button still not appearing after inline edit — root cause was ref mutation not triggering React re-render
Added editVersion state counter — incremented on blur and on reset — forces React to re-evaluate hasEdit and show/hide the Reset button correctly
Fixed: Reset button was hidden behind hover/opacity logic that didn't work reliably in contentEditable sections
Reset button now appears persistently above any section that has been inline-edited — labeled 'Reset [Section Name]' in team color
Blue focus outline still appears when a section is actively being edited
Updated guide and preview hint text to remove references to hover behavior
Updated Welcome Email Generator guide section to document section toggles and inline editing added in V1.7.6
Added section toggles — 9 toggle switches in the form panel (Opening, Division Overview, Schedule, Weather, Uniforms, Parents, GameChanger, Roster, Sign-off)
Toggled-off sections are fully absent from the preview and copied output
Toggle switches styled in team color, all on by default
Added inline editing — each section in the preview is directly contentEditable
Inline edits are an override layer on top of generated content — form field changes do not overwrite inline edits
Hover any section to reveal a subtle dashed outline and a Reset button
Reset button clears the inline override for that section and reverts to the generated version
Copy Text and Copy HTML capture the live preview including all inline edits
Removed Quick Reference card from the Guide tab — content duplicated the legend already visible on the Draft Board
Enriched legend with previously missing indicators: PR badge, notepad icon (scouting notes), green border (YoY improvement), yellow background (pending eval), gold banner (NBA)
Legend reordered for better flow — visual indicators first, then modes and views
Removed redundant 'Coach daughters auto-assigned' entry from legend — covered by blue badge entry
Guide tab redesigned — 17 sections reorganized into four labeled categories: Understanding the Board, During the Draft, Tabs and Views, Team Tools

roadmap.feature: Archive Board — one-way lock, permanent read-only season record
roadmap.detail: One-way permanent lock via Commissioner Mode; board becomes read-only for all users; accessible at its URL as a season record; requires archive unlock code to reverse

roadmap.feature: Dark Mode — light, dark, and system theme toggle
roadmap.detail: Three-way toggle: Light, Dark, and System (follows OS setting); preference saved across sessions; all colors use CSS variables for full theme support

roadmap.feature: Analytics Tab — team radar, draft timeline, player scatter, and tier distribution charts
roadmap.detail: Four interactive Chart.js charts: team radar, draft score timeline, station averages bar chart, and tier distribution; dark-mode aware and color-matched to team colors

roadmap.feature: Previously Coached Flag — per-coach badge and NBA tiebreaker for players coached last season
roadmap.detail: Coaches mark players they coached last season via a toggle on the card or modal; shows purple 🏅 badge; private per-team data; used as tiebreaker in Next Best Available

roadmap.feature: Trade / Swap Feature — reassign drafted players between teams
roadmap.detail: Allow commissioners or coaches to reassign drafted players between teams after the draft; useful for trades and post-draft adjustments

roadmap.feature: Draft Board Web App — full SaaS with auth, database, multi-sport/multi-league support
roadmap.detail: Cloud-hosted version with user authentication, persistent database, and support for multiple sports, leagues, and seasons without NAS setup

roadmap.feature: Commissioner Mode — password-protected board config: teams, players, stations, settings
roadmap.detail: Password-protected panel for league setup (teams, coaches, colors), eval station config, player import, pre-assigned players, schedule, positions, and board settings

roadmap.feature: Onboarding Tutorial — guided tour with highlights and tooltips for new users
roadmap.detail: Step-by-step guided tour with animated highlights, arrows, and tooltips; covers all major features; accessible from the toolbar at any time

roadmap.feature: Welcome Email Generator — auto-fills roster, team, and season info
roadmap.detail: Generates a formatted HTML season welcome email; auto-fills team name, coaches, roster, league name, division, and year; 9 toggleable sections with inline editing

roadmap.feature: Per-Player Notes — private per-team scouting notes on each player card
roadmap.detail: Private per-player scouting notes for each team; notes sync in real time and persist across restarts; shown as 📝 icon on player cards

roadmap.feature: Clickable Player Names — player detail modal with full eval stats
roadmap.detail: Click any player name to open a full-screen card modal with tier, scores, YoY comparison, priority badge, PR, notes, and coaching history

roadmap.feature: Shared Notes Tab — private per-team rich-text notepad with real-time sync
roadmap.detail: Private per-team notepad with bold, italic, bullet, and numbered list formatting; syncs in real time across all devices on the same team

roadmap.feature: Position Tags — user-assigned position badges on player cards
roadmap.detail: Assign one or more position badges (P, C, 1B, etc.) to players; visible on cards, modal, team view, pick order, and draft recap; commissioner-configurable

roadmap.feature: Server Logging — in-memory log viewer at /logs with auto-refresh
roadmap.detail: Server-side event log with timestamp, level, and message; accessible at /logs with auto-refresh; useful for diagnosing sync and save issues

roadmap.feature: New Season / Factory Reset — wipes all board data and resets commissioner password
roadmap.detail: Wipes all draft picks, notes, commissioner config, and player data; resets commissioner password to default; requires typed confirmation; cannot be undone

roadmap.feature: What's New Tab — collapsible changelog grouped by minor version
roadmap.detail: Changelog entries grouped and collapsed by minor version; most recent version expanded by default; includes versioning legend and roadmap

roadmap.feature: GitHub Publishing + Documentation — README, SETUP, and season management guide
roadmap.detail: Published to GitHub at github.com/rebrook/draftkit with README.md (project overview, features, tech stack), SETUP.md (local and Synology NAS deployment, season management lifecycle), and .gitignore

roadmap.feature: CSV Template Download — generates a pre-formatted import CSV with configured station names
roadmap.detail: ⬇ Download Template button in Commissioner Mode Players section; generates a CSV pre-formatted with configured station names as column headers and one example row

roadmap.feature: My Team First-Run Nudge — banner prompts coaches to set their team on first load
roadmap.detail: Yellow dismissible banner shown on first load when no team has been explicitly selected; disappears when a team button is clicked or dismissed manually

roadmap.feature: Password Recovery — Forgot Password flow resets commissioner password to default
roadmap.detail: Forgot Password link on Commissioner login modal; requires typing RESET PASSWORD to confirm; resets password to default (commissioner) via server endpoint

roadmap.feature: Player Column Sorting — sortable columns in Commissioner Mode player table
roadmap.detail: Click any column header in Commissioner Mode player table to sort; all 10 columns supported; active column highlighted with ▲/▼; uses stable player id to prevent mutation bugs

roadmap.feature: Pre-Assigned Player Visual Treatment — blue tint card and locked label on draft board
roadmap.detail: Pre-assigned players show a blue tint card, ⭐ badge, and locked label instead of draft buttons; COACH_DAUGHTERS constant removed; commissioner config is sole source of truth

roadmap.feature: Division Field — Commissioner Mode league setup field shown in board header
roadmap.detail: Division field in Commissioner Mode League Setup (e.g. 11-13, Varsity, U12); shown in the board header subtitle between league name and player count

roadmap.feature: Prior Season Score Auto-Detection — players with no current scores use prior season data
roadmap.detail: Players with blank current scores but valid prior season scores (PS1-PS5) automatically use prior data for tier, overall, and PR; amber 📋 note shown on card

roadmap.feature: Pending Eval Checkbox — flags players with no evals; yellow treatment, no tier or PR
roadmap.detail: Checkbox in Commissioner Mode player table; pending players get yellow card treatment, no tier badge, no PR, and are excluded from team averages and NBA

roadmap.feature: Per-Team Roster Export — team filter in Export overlay with single-team .xlsx download
roadmap.detail: Team filter dropdown in Export overlay; selecting a team shows only that team's card and downloads a per-team .xlsx with name, age, scores, tier, positions, and round

knownIssues.summary: HTML assembly is manual and error-prone
knownIssues.detail: Rebuilding index_demo.html from the JSX requires 4 manual steps: remove duplicate BOARD_ID, remove export default, add useDraftSync call, and verify ReactDOM.createRoot is present. A build script is not planned since the HTML is always assembled during development sessions, not independently. Mitigation: a 5-point verification checklist is run after every assembly — (1) BOARD_ID appears once, (2) no export default, (3) useDraftSync call present, (4) ReactDOM.createRoot present, (5) closing tags correct.

knownIssues.summary: Player modal does not update in real time while open
knownIssues.detail: If the modal is open and another coach drafts that player via WebSocket sync, the modal header and draft status will not reflect the change until it is closed and reopened. The board itself updates correctly.

knownIssues.summary: Player name tap target may be too small on mobile
knownIssues.detail: The underlined name text on compact player cards — especially for players with short names in lower tiers — may be difficult to tap precisely on small screens. Consider increasing the tap target area in a future update.

knownIssues.summary: Player modal behavior inside Draft Recap overlay unverified
knownIssues.detail: The Draft Recap overlay uses zIndex 1000 and the player modal uses zIndex 2000, which should allow the modal to render correctly on top of the recap. This has not been verified on the live board and may need testing.

knownIssues.summary: Player modal for pending-eval players renders mostly empty
knownIssues.detail: Players with no 2026 eval scores show only a pending notice in the modal body with no eval bars, YoY comparison, or stats. This is expected behavior but may be confusing. Consider a more informative placeholder in a future update.

The log buffer is in-memory only and clears every time the server restarts. If an issue occurs and the server restarts before logs are copied or downloaded, the evidence is lost. Future enhancement: persist logs to a rolling file on disk.

knownIssues.summary: Position labels cannot be edited inline in Commissioner Mode
knownIssues.detail: The Positions section in Commissioner Mode does not support inline editing of existing position labels. To rename a position, delete it and re-add it with the correct name. Inline editing is deferred due to contentEditable complexity.

knownIssues.summary: Schedule row overflows viewport on mobile when label and dates are side by side
knownIssues.detail: On narrow screens the schedule container renders the ‘📅 Schedule’ label and dates row inline, leaving insufficient width for the dates to scroll properly. The fix requires a responsive layout — stacking the label above the dates row on mobile while preserving the side-by-side layout on desktop. Deferred to a future update.

rules.trigger: Bug fixes, copy changes, minor UI tweaks, roadmap and changelog metadata updates
New feature area, new tab, or new major panel
Platform-level change — SaaS, authentication, database backend

thresholds.next_minor: V1.12.0 — triggered by Analytics Tab, New Season / Factory Reset, or equivalent new feature area
thresholds.next_major: V2.0.0 — triggered by Draft Board Web App (SaaS) rebuild
